title: CMPLX Bipartite Review Remediation and Standards Expansion Goal

phases.name: Foundation — Fix Model-Fit Gaps
phases.description: Address Side B findings that directly impact the current suite's model fit and inclusion bands.

work_items.title: Raise sm_mapping_row fit above 90
work_items.description: sm_mapping_row average fit is 87.24. Diagnose missing fields or vocabulary mismatches in source data against model contract. Backfill or restructure records.
acceptance_criteria: sm_mapping_row average fit >= 90.0
At least one perfect-fit record exists
Suite total average fit stays >= 97.0

work_items.title: Achieve perfect-fit records in assembled_paper
work_items.description: assembled_paper has 40 records but zero perfect-fit. Identify which fields are missing or which values are outside allowed_values. Either fix the data or relax the model contract if the fields are genuinely not applicable.
acceptance_criteria: assembled_paper has at least one perfect-fit record
No regression in other models

phases.name: Inclusion — Verify FLCR and Registry Routing
phases.description: Ensure all valid FLCR papers and registry rows are correctly included in the suite, and fix routing that sent valid records to MANUAL_REVIEW.

work_items.title: Verify FLCR-01 through FLCR-40 paper inclusion
work_items.description: Audit that all 40 FLCR papers exist in assembled_paper or normal_form models. Any missing ones must be ingested. Any in skip-audit flagged state must be routed to correct models.
acceptance_criteria: All FLCR papers (1-40) present in assembled_paper or normal_form
Zero FLCR papers in MANUAL_REVIEW skip state without documented reason

work_items.title: Action ROUTE_SLOT (254) and REGISTER_TOOL (43) recommendations
work_items.description: 1,301 registry rows were skipped. 254 marked ROUTE_SLOT and 43 marked REGISTER_TOOL. Action these recommendations: route valid records into models, register tools into appropriate registry.
acceptance_criteria: All 254 ROUTE_SLOT recommendations executed or documented as declined
All 43 REGISTER_TOOL recommendations executed or documented as declined
Skip audit re-run shows <5% flagged rate (down from 13.9%)

phases.name: Historical — Legacy Seed Promotion and Blocker Resolution
phases.description: Promote the 7 direct-port legacy seeds into the suite and resolve or document the 24 blockers preventing full historical data inclusion.

work_items.title: Document 24 legacy blockers as resolved or accepted residues
work_items.description: 24 unique blockers prevent legacy seed promotion (e.g., avoid_duplicate_canonicalization, choose_mmdb_contract, coin_library_scope_review). For each blocker: either resolve it, document it as an accepted residue with justification, or map it to a specific future work item.
acceptance_criteria: Every blocker has a disposition: RESOLVED, ACCEPTED_RESIDUE, or DEFERRED_WITH_TICKET
BLOCKER_RESOLUTION_LOG.json written to CMPLX-Standards/output/

work_items.title: Promote 7 direct-port legacy seeds into ability_seed model
work_items.description: LEGACY_HARVEST_STATUS identified 7 direct-port candidates with high confidence (0.82-0.90). Create ability_seed records for each, run through CMPLX-Standards gate, and ensure fit >= 90.
acceptance_criteria: 7 new ability_seed records created and graded
All 7 records fit >= 90
Seed IDs mapped: LEGACY-TMN-MINT-003, LEGACY-MDGH-MMDB-005, LEGACY-E8-LEECH-006, LEGACY-REPO-KERNEL-009, LEGACY-FORMAL-SUITE-012, LEGACY-R30-PROOF-015, LEGACY-PARTSFACTORY-LATTICE-016

work_items.title: Ingest and diff CLOSURE_INCLUSION_PASS_STATE
work_items.description: CLOSURE_INCLUSION_PASS_STATE may contain records or bindings not reflected in the current suite. Diff it against the suite to identify any additions, then ingest if they improve model fit.
acceptance_criteria: Diff report generated showing closure state vs current suite
Any new valid records ingested with fit >= 90
No regression in existing suite records

phases.name: Enrichment — Historical Source Harvesting
phases.description: Systematically review and harvest model-mappable data from 10 unharvested historical sources.

work_items.title: Harvest archive_history and archive_crystal_queue data
work_items.description: Review ARCHIVE_HISTORY_CRYSTAL_QUEUE.json and archive_history indexes for model-mappable records. Extract any seed, mapping, or receipt data that belongs in existing models.
acceptance_criteria: Harvest report written documenting what was found and what was mapped
Any new records ingested with fit >= 90

work_items.title: Harvest FLCR24 hunt reports (split_lane + widened)
work_items.description: FLCR24_SPLIT_LANE_HUNT_REPORT and FLCR24_WIDENED_HUNT_REPORT contain lane-level analysis that may map to sm_mapping_row or normal_form.
acceptance_criteria: Both reports reviewed for model-mappable records
Any new records ingested with fit >= 90

work_items.title: Harvest repo findings, triad grades, and critical connections
work_items.description: Review LEGACY_REPO_FINDINGS_ASSEMBLY, TMN_LEGACY_TRIAD_STANDARDS_GRADE, and CRITICAL_CONNECTIONS_REPORT for any records that should map to ability_seed, legacy_repo_port, or external_pair.
acceptance_criteria: All three reports reviewed
Any new records ingested with fit >= 90

work_items.title: Harvest proof_chain, paper_aggregation, paper_content_needs, obligation_rows
work_items.description: Review PROOF_CHAIN_CONTEXT_REVIEW, PAPER_AGGREGATION_CONTENT_SCAN, PAPER_CONTENT_NEEDS_REPORT, and OBLIGATION_ROWS for model-mappable data.
acceptance_criteria: All four reports reviewed
Any new records ingested with fit >= 90

phases.name: Standards — New Models and Metadata Preservation
phases.description: Define new model contracts to capture NIST metadata and higher-level assemblies without polluting existing model fit.

work_items.title: Create peer_review_metadata sub-model or extension
work_items.description: NIST legacy diff contains peer_recommendation and apply_next for each FLCR-01..40. Create a peer_review_metadata model that references assembled_paper/normal_form records without requiring those fields in the base model.
acceptance_criteria: peer_review_metadata_model.json defined in CMPLX-Standards/models/
40 records created (one per FLCR paper)
Average fit >= 90
Base model fit unchanged (no regression)

work_items.title: Create assembly_cluster model for triads and octads
work_items.description: 5 triads and 3 octads are composite groupings not representable by existing models. Create an assembly_cluster model that groups seeds/triads/octads with references to their constituent ability_seed records.
acceptance_criteria: assembly_cluster_model.json defined in CMPLX-Standards/models/
8 cluster records created (5 triads + 3 octads)
Average fit >= 90

work_items.title: Preserve NIST per-standard granularity as optional extensions
work_items.description: Each NIST record has 6 standard-level checks (claim_coverage, obligation_continuity, etc.). Add these as optional extension fields to the peer_review_metadata model so audit traceability is preserved without making them required.
acceptance_criteria: 240 standard-level checks (40 records x 6 standards) preserved in peer_review_metadata extension
Optional fields do not affect base model fit scoring

risk_register.description: Fixing sm_mapping_row/assembled_paper may require relaxing model contracts, which could reduce rigor
risk_register.mitigation: Only relax optional fields; never reduce required field weights. Document every change in MODEL_CHANGE_LOG.md

risk_register.description: Harvesting historical sources may introduce stale or incorrect data
risk_register.mitigation: Every harvested record must pass CMPLX-Standards gate with fit >= 90. Reject anything that would reduce model fit.

risk_register.description: Legacy seed promotion may trigger new blockers in runtime environments
risk_register.mitigation: Promote seeds incrementally (one at a time) with smoke tests after each.

reporting.weekly_checkin: Every 7 days, update progress tracker and re-run bipartite review
reporting.completion_gate: Full suite re-run with all models achieving fit >= 90 and zero non/weak records
